name: The Two Ronnies
overview: The Two Ronnies is a British sketch show which aired on BBC1 from 1971 to 1987. It featured the double act of Ronnie Barker and Ronnie Corbett, the "Two Ronnies" of the title.

trailers.title: BBC ONE Trailer for the Two Ronnies Night (1999)
